THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, KAREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1135 LAGUNA ST, APT 404, SF 94115 $886.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $886.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-13-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, $886 DUE FOR BK RENT THRU 8/31/93; DEF WAR NO OTHER ADULT OCCUPYING PREM AS OF 8/23/93; NO FUR STAYS; SEC DEP APP TO BK RENT BAL OR OTHER DAM.
